fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the measured liquid volume, in milliliters, of individual drink servings in the context of analyzing caffeine content across various beverage products.

fields.name: Calories
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the number of calories contained in each drink, quantifying the energy provided per serving, which is relevant for nutrition and health tracking in beverages.

fields.name: Caffeine (mg)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the measured amount of caffeine, in milligrams, contained in various beverages, indicating their stimulant potency for dietary or health considerations.

fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field categorizes beverages by their general drink type, indicating the classification of each entry (e.g., coffee, tea, water) within the context of analyzing caffeine content.

### Description

  - Calories -- type: int64, values: 0, 2, 3, 4, 5, ..., 390, 410, 429, 470, 830
